name: Carta
tagline: Carta MCP plus skills for cap table, CRM, investor, and equity workflows
description: Registers the Carta MCP server (OAuth-authorized) and bundles a focused skill pack for cap table workflows, Carta CRM, investor reporting, fund benchmarks, tearsheets, compensation benchmarks, equity scenarios, and workbook-based budgeting. A single plugin avoids duplicate MCP entries while exposing focused skills per workflow.
